title: Editorial Contacts
description: Here's how to reach the editorial staff of Military Times and Defense News.
text:

Editorial News Tips, Opinion Submissions
For information regarding editorial content, comments, or News Tips for our reporters, send an email to tips@militarytimes.com. Have a correction? Send an email to corrections@militarytimes.com. To pitch or submit an opinion piece, please email opinion@militarytimes.com. Here are our opinion guidelines.
Sightline Media Group Subscription Services
Check out this comprehensive list of links to sign up for a new subscription, renew an existing subscription, or ask a question about a subscription.
Advertising
For Military Times advertising requests, please email us at advertisingsales@sightlinemg.com, and an appropriate representative will get back to you shortly.
